headline: Can Seagate's Data Center Business Maintain its Growth Momentum?
summary: STX's data center business is surging as cloud demand, Mozaic drive adoption and long-term supply agreements fuel revenue growth through fiscal 2027.

headline: NetApp: Share Gains Will Determine The Next Leg Higher
summary: NetApp finished FY 2026 with around $3.6 billion of cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments. Check out why NTAP stock is a buy.
